subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the divine fragrances! It is dawn, and each soul is caught up in its desires, while this servant is absorbed in remembrance of Thy face and character [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات حق صبح است و هر نفسی در هوسی و این عبد بیاد روی و خلق و خوی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
